titleStmt.title: SII 18.333: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 333. (B.K. No. 123 of 1932-33.) KAḶḶĪHĀḶ, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab in front of the temple of Dayā-Paramēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 977, Manmatha, Chaitra ba. 11, Friday, Vishu-saṁkrānti. The date is irregular. By the Saṁkrānti and week-day the details correspond to A.D. 1055, March 24, Friday. The tithi however was 9 which ended at ·58. It states that Suṁkavergaḍe Chaṭṭimayya, Manneya Rājādityarasa and others made a gift of taxes for burning a perpetual lamp to god Sādēvēśvara.

It also contains another record of a grant of money for the same purpose made on Pushya śu. 5, [Uttarāya]ṇa-saṁkrānti (apparently of the same year). The week-day is lost. The details correspond to A.D. 1055, December 25, Monday; f.d.t. ·14. The donor of the latter grant was Kaliyammarasa of the Jīmūtavāhana lineage and Khachara family.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samastarājyabharanirūpita mahāmātyapadavīvirājamāna mānōṁnata prabhumaṁtrōEngraved in
tsāhaśaktitrayasaṁpanna sujanaprasaṁna gōtrapavitra budhajanamitraṁ bandhujanādhāra paranārīdūra
nāmādipraśastisahitaṁ śrīmatsuṁkaverggaḍe caṭṭimayyaṁgaḷ śrīmat vaḍḍarāvuḷada perggaḍe sōva
yyanuṁ bilukaḍeya perggaḍe poḷalamayyanuṁ śrīmat manneya rājādityarasanuṁ
gāvuṇḍa cāvuṇḍamayyanumivaru pramukhavāgirddu sakavarṣa 977 neya manmatha saṁ
vatsarada caitra bahuḷa Ēkādaśi śukravāra viṣusaṁkramantiyandu sādēvē
śvaradēvargge nandādīvigege gātradalondu pēṟaṁ koylāḷi bojaṁga sahitamāgi
rddu suṁkavaṁ biṭṭukoṭṭar . Ī dharmmava pratipāḷisidavaṁge prayāge vāraṇāśi kurukṣē
tradoḷ sahasra gōdānaṁgoṭṭa phalamaku . Idanaḷidavaṁ prayāge vāraṇāśi kuru
kṣētradoḷ sāsira kavileyuṁ sāsirvvarbrāhmaṇarumanaḷida paṁcamahāpātakanakku
ge manuvākyamentene sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētunṛpāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhava
dbhiḥ sarvvānētānbhāginaḥ pārtthivēṁdrō bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadra . śubhacandraya
© svasti samastavasumatītaḷakhyātaṁ jīmūtavāhanānvayaprasūtaṁ bandhu
maḷinīrājahaṁsaṁ khacaravaṁśōttaṁsaṁ pagevara bhīmaṁ caladaṁkarāmaṁ nāmā
stisahitaṁ śrīmat kaliyaṁmmarasarbāsavuranūṟa nālvattarkka nāḷgā
ttamirdu puṣya suddha paṁcami ṇa saṁkrāntiyaṁdu sādē
vargge naṁdādīvigeya soḍa yapoṁnnaṁ koṭṭu caṁ
Ī dharmmamaṁ pratipā sira kavile
goṭṭa phaḷamakku . Ida
ku . bahubhi
tadā phalaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 18.333 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
